pi_items.source: Task instructions explicitly state to select the PCI-DSS standard under the Compliance section.
Task instructions require viewing a compliance report, confirmed by the Compliance section location.
The task instructions do not specify a time range, and web search confirms the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer default is "Today" for compliance reports.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires viewing a compliance report for the PCI-DSS standard in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer. The report type is confirmed as compliance. The claimed time range of current_month is unsupported by instructions and contradicts the software default of Today. The data analyzed consists of system logs from the environment.
